'''Tamban''' was an inhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. From Tamban, the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]<ref name="TCSWE" /> near the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]<ref name="NEGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref> could be observed through a [[Telescope/Legends|telescope]]. It was ruled by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Preedu III]] before [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] rose to power.<ref name="TCSWE" />
